nodes.name: 圣菲省
nodes.summary: 圣菲省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括白枕霸鹟、Stripe-backed antbird、Great rufous woodcreeper等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Scimitar-billed woodcreeper
nodes.summary: Scimitar-billed woodcreeper（Scimitar-billed woodcreeper，学名 Drymornis bridgesii），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联12个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原。

nodes.name: 灌丛

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The scimitar-billed woodcreeper (Drymornis bridgesii) is a species of bird in the subfamily Dendrocolaptinae of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Paraguay, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The scimitar-billed woodcreeper is found in extreme southeastern Bolivia, western Paraguay, the Brazilian state of Rio Grande do Sul, and through Uruguay south to north-central Argentina

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits the Gran Chaco, Pampas, and Argentine Espinal ecoregions, where it occurs in woodlands, scrublands, thorn forest, and savanna
